creator: gabor@kovesdan.org
text:
Dear Paul,

are you able to reproduce this problem in a clean environment? Sometimes 
it also happened to me that the pkg database didn't know about a 
specific port, which was actually installed and I had to use 
FORCE_PKG_REGISTER just like you. However, this is not normal and should 
not happen. In your case it happened with textproc/xmlcharent, which is 
a dependency of DocBook. Removing the files you mentioned was incorrect 
because now SGML/XML-related utilities won't know about these packages. 
I'll assign this PR to its maintainer and suggest a patch, which handles 
better such cases. Thanks for your report!

Gabor Kovesdan
